title: Quiz: Introduction to Quantum Algorithms
description: Test your understanding of quantum algorithm basics

questions.question: Grover's algorithm provides what type of speedup?
questions.explanation: Grover's provides quadratic speedup: O(√N) vs O(N) classical.

questions.question: Which quantum phenomenon allows exploring multiple solutions simultaneously?
questions.explanation: Superposition allows qubits to represent multiple states at once.

questions.question: Shor's algorithm solves which problem?
questions.explanation: Shor's algorithm factors integers in polynomial time.

questions.question: All problems have quantum algorithms that are faster than classical ones.
questions.explanation: Not all problems benefit from quantum speedup. Some are already optimally solved classically.
